COMMERCIAL B2B CONTRACT
This agreement is governed by the laws of Belgium. Any dispute shall be referred to the courts of Brussels.
The buyer shall pay the seller the sum of 10000 EUR for the goods. Payment terms are 30 days.
The seller warrants that the goods are free from defects. Title transfers upon delivery.
Either party may terminate this contract in the event of default by the other party with 15 days notice.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
